channel.title: Frontion — Geopolitical Headlines
channel.description: Real-time geopolitical news curation from global sources

item.title: Iran FM Araghchi: Ending war in Lebanon is 'most important issue' in US deal
item.description: 🇮🇷🇱🇧 Iran FM Araghchi: Ending war in Lebanon is 'most important issue' in US deal — Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi stated that ending the war on all fronts including Lebanon was the most critical component of the US-Iran agreement, raising pressure on Israel to withdraw from Lebanese territory.

item.title: Hormuz mine-clearing could delay full shipping return by 40–50 days
item.description: 🛢️⚓ Hormuz mine-clearing could delay full shipping return by 40–50 days — Demining operations involving conventional minesweepers and underwater drones may take 40–50 days before insurers and shipping companies feel confident enough to resume normal traffic through the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: France to try 14 over Channel disaster that left 27 Iraqi Kurdish migrants dead
item.description: 🇫🇷⚖️ France to try 14 over Channel disaster that left 27 Iraqi Kurdish migrants dead — Fourteen people face trial in France over the deaths of at least 27 migrants in the November 2021 English Channel sinking — the deadliest recorded crossing disaster — in a case that could reshape people-smuggling prosecution across Europe.

item.title: Red Cross warns Congo Ebola epidemic yet to peak, may last a year
item.description: 🇨🇩🦠 Red Cross warns Congo Ebola epidemic yet to peak, may last a year — A Red Cross official warned that the Ebola epidemic in eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo has not yet peaked and could persist for a year, deepening the humanitarian crisis in the conflict-ridden region.

item.title: Trump warns Netanyahu to be 'more responsible' as US-Israel rift deepens over Iran deal
item.description: 🇺🇸🇮🇱 Trump warns Netanyahu to be 'more responsible' as US-Israel rift deepens over Iran deal — President Trump publicly rebuked Netanyahu, saying Israel must act more responsibly regarding Lebanon and Hezbollah, as the US-Israel rift over the Iran agreement widens and Iran demands Israeli withdrawal from Lebanon.

item.title: Iran says peace deal requires Israeli withdrawal from Lebanon
item.description: 🇮🇷🇮🇱 Iran says peace deal requires Israeli withdrawal from Lebanon — Iran's top diplomat stated that ending the war with the US hinges on Israel withdrawing from southern Lebanon, adding a major complication as Trump pushes to finalize the agreement at the G7 summit.

item.title: G7 summit opens with Iran deal and Ukraine war dominating agenda
item.description: 🇫🇷🌍 G7 summit opens with Iran deal and Ukraine war dominating agenda — World leaders gathered in Evian, France for the G7 summit as Trump promotes his preliminary Iran peace deal while allies scramble to keep Ukraine firmly on the agenda alongside Middle East diplomacy.

item.title: New Fed Chair Warsh faces hawkish shift as first meeting looms
item.description: 🏛️💰 New Fed Chair Warsh faces hawkish shift as first meeting looms — Kevin Warsh convenes his first Federal Reserve meeting with rate hike expectations rising and the dot plot expected to show a hawkish shift, just weeks after replacing Jerome Powell.

item.title: Israel Lebanon stance threatens to unravel US-Iran agreement
item.description: ⚔️🇱🇧 Israel Lebanon stance threatens to unravel US-Iran agreement — The US-Iran ceasefire deal hinges on Israel accepting a ceasefire in Lebanon, something it is reluctant to do, creating a key obstacle as mediators try to finalize terms this week.

item.title: Japan PM Takaichi pushes coordinated G7 response to China trade tactics
item.description: 🇯🇵🇨🇳 Japan PM Takaichi pushes coordinated G7 response to China trade tactics — At the G7 summit, Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi urged allies to develop a united front against Beijing's use of export controls and trade leverage, signaling rising concern over China Shock 2.0.

item.title: Zelensky, Trump, Macron Hold Behind-the-Scenes Meeting at G7 Summit
item.description: 🇺🇦 Zelensky, Trump, Macron Hold Behind-the-Scenes Meeting at G7 Summit — Ukrainian President Zelensky met face-to-face with Trump and Macron on the sidelines of the G7 summit in Evian, their first encounter in nearly four months, as Kyiv pushes to revive peace negotiations.

item.title: Ukrainian Drones Strike Moscow Largest Oil Refinery Miles from Kremlin
item.description: 🇷🇺 Ukrainian Drones Strike Moscow Largest Oil Refinery Miles from Kremlin — Ukraine launched dozens of drones into Moscow, reportedly causing significant damage to the citys largest oil refinery just miles from the Kremlin, marking the ninth consecutive day of drone attacks on the Russian capital.

item.title: US Military Plans Permanent War-Ready Weapons Stockpile in Australia
item.description: 🇦🇺 US Military Plans Permanent War-Ready Weapons Stockpile in Australia — The US military is planning a permanent war-ready weapons stockpile for its Marine Corps on Australias southeast coast, positioned beyond the range of most Chinese missiles, according to tender documents and officials.

item.title: Japan Undecided on Sending Military Forces to Strait of Hormuz
item.description: 🇯🇵 Japan Undecided on Sending Military Forces to Strait of Hormuz — Japan said Tuesday it has not yet decided whether its military will join international efforts to help resume shipping through the Strait of Hormuz following the US-Iran ceasefire agreement.

item.title: Lukashenko Says Belarus Poses No Military Threat to Ukraine, Apologizes to Zelensky
item.description: 🇧🇾🇺🇦 Lukashenko Says Belarus Poses No Military Threat to Ukraine, Apologizes to Zelensky — Belarusian leader Alexander Lukashenko stated Belarus poses no military threat to Ukraine and apologized to President Zelensky for previous harsh remarks, a notable diplomatic signal as G7 leaders discuss pathways to ending the Russia-Ukraine war.

item.title: US Air Force B-52 bomber crashes at Edwards AFB, all 8 crew killed
item.description: 🇺🇸✈️ US Air Force B-52 bomber crashes at Edwards AFB, all 8 crew killed — A B-52 Stratofortress crashed shortly after takeoff at Edwards Air Force Base in California, bursting into flames and killing all eight crew members aboard, including two Boeing employees.

item.title: Iran soccer team blocked from training in US, welcomed by Tijuana amid World Cup
item.description: 🇮🇷⚽ Iran soccer team blocked from training in US, welcomed by Tijuana amid World Cup — Iran's World Cup squad was denied entry to train in the United States amid the recent conflict, but the Mexican border city of Tijuana rolled out a welcome for the team caught between sport and geopolitics.

item.title: Netanyahu and Trump on Collision Course as US-Iran Deal Falls Short of Israeli War Goals
item.description: 🇮🇱⚔️🇺🇸 Netanyahu and Trump on Collision Course as US-Iran Deal Falls Short of Israeli War Goals — Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu pushed back against the US-Iran peace agreement, declaring that "the struggle has not ended." The deal falls short of Israel's stated war objectives, creating a rift between the two allies at a critical moment.

item.title: Historic Kyiv Pechersk Lavra Monastery Set Ablaze in Russian Strike
item.description: ⛪🇺🇦💥 Historic Kyiv Pechersk Lavra Monastery Set Ablaze in Russian Strike — A nearly 1,000-year-old monastery — one of Ukraine's most sacred cultural sites with golden domes towering over Kyiv for centuries — was set ablaze during a Russian attack. Firefighters worked to contain the damage to the historic cathedral famed for its frescoes and silver artefacts.

item.title: Ukraine drives rush for mini drone laser-targeting systems as battlefield demand surges
item.description: ⚔️ Ukraine drives rush for mini drone laser-targeting systems as battlefield demand surges — Defense companies are racing to miniaturize laser target-marking technology for small UAVs after Ukraine requested compact systems suited to its drone-heavy battlefield tactics, spurring new product launches across the industry.

item.title: China develops military stealth coating that could be mass-produced as cheap house paint
item.description: 🇨🇳 China develops military stealth coating that could be mass-produced as cheap house paint — Chinese researchers have created a new microwave-absorbing material that could make stealth technology far cheaper to produce, sparking debate over reports that commercial stealth paint may already be available on the open market.

item.title: Central banks accelerate gold buying as de-dollarization trend deepens worldwide
item.description: 💰 Central banks accelerate gold buying as de-dollarization trend deepens worldwide — The World Gold Council reports that nearly 90% of central banks plan to increase gold holdings as countries diversify reserves away from the US dollar, reflecting a structural shift in global finance amid geopolitical fragmentation.

item.title: Congress reacts with skepticism to Trump-Iran deal, demands briefing on secret terms
item.description: 🏛️ Congress reacts with skepticism to Trump-Iran deal, demands briefing on secret terms — Republican and Democratic senators alike expressed deep skepticism about the US-Iran agreement, with GOP hawks calling it a surrender and Democrats demanding immediate classified briefings on the deal’s undisclosed terms.

item.title: JD Vance admits unresolved issues remain in Iran peace deal ahead of G7 talks
item.description: 🇺🇸 JD Vance admits unresolved issues remain in Iran peace deal ahead of G7 talks — Vice President JD Vance acknowledged that several issues still remain in the US-Iran peace agreement as G7 leaders prepare to discuss the Middle East, tempering expectations for a finalized deal at the summit.

item.title: Trump Iran deal offers exit from war but raises fresh political risks at home
item.description: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 Trump Iran deal offers exit from war but raises fresh political risks at home — The US-Iran peace agreement gives Trump a way out of the 3.5-month conflict, but skeptical conservatives in Congress are raising concerns over whether Iran will regain access to its frozen assets under the deal.
